song.title: Broken Spurs
song.description: Full lyrics to 'Broken Spurs' from Cowboys EP by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: Broken Spurs Lyrics - Cowboys EP
og.description: Full lyrics to Broken Spurs from Cowboys EP.

twitter.title: Broken Spurs Lyrics - Agust Islandia
twitter.description: Full official lyrics for Broken Spurs.

essay: Broken Spurs is the emotional center of Cowboys EP, mourning love deferred by fear and social pressure. It reframes queer country as a space for tenderness, grief, and memory.
song.lyricsHtml:
Your hat's on the peg but your boots are gone
The fire burns low and the night feels long
I still hear your laughter soft and low
A cowboy's love the world won't know

Broken spurs on the old barn floor
A love like ours they can't ignore
We hid too long now the night feels cold
Two cowboy stories that never got told

They said a cowboy's heart was made of steel
But they don't know the hurt that I still feel
Your smile was my shelter my only song
Now the trail keeps rolling but you are gone

Broken spurs on the old barn floor
A love like ours they can't ignore
We hid too long now the night feels cold
Two cowboy stories that never got told

We dreamed of a life where the truth could shine
Two cowboys together your hand in mine
But the years rolled by and the chance slipped away
Now I'm riding alone through the break of day

Now the saddle's still hanging the rain's left to dry
I whisper your name to the empty sky
With broken spurs and a lonesome song
I'll carry our story though you've been gone

Broken spurs on the old barn floor
A love like ours still echoes forevermore
We hid too long now the truth unfolds
Two cowboy stories that's finally been told
